scripts.dev:electron: concurrently -k -n vite,electron "cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 vite --host 127.0.0.1" "wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:5173 && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron ."
scripts.build:electron: cross-env ELECTRON_MIRROR=https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron/ ELECTRON_BUILDER_BINARIES_MIRROR=https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron-builder-binaries/ vite build --mode electron && node scripts/check-electron-bundle.cjs && cross-env ELECTRON_MIRROR=https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron/ ELECTRON_BUILDER_BINARIES_MIRROR=https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron-builder-binaries/ electron-builder --win --x64
scripts.build:electron:dir: cross-env ELECTRON_MIRROR=https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron/ ELECTRON_BUILDER_BINARIES_MIRROR=https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron-builder-binaries/ vite build --mode electron && node scripts/check-electron-bundle.cjs && cross-env ELECTRON_MIRROR=https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron/ ELECTRON_BUILDER_BINARIES_MIRROR=https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron-builder-binaries/ electron-builder --win --x64 --dir
scripts.build:electron:safe: cross-env ELECTRON_MIRROR=https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron/ ELECTRON_BUILDER_BINARIES_MIRROR=https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron-builder-binaries/ vite build --mode electron && node scripts/check-electron-bundle.cjs && cross-env ELECTRON_MIRROR=https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron/ ELECTRON_BUILDER_BINARIES_MIRROR=https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron-builder-binaries/ electron-builder --win --x64 --config.directories.output=../xxgkami-electron-release
